name: Account Engagement Ranking
description: Give your AEs a ranked list of the hottest accounts right now, and a flag list of the target accounts that have gone quiet.
alsoSurfaces: Which 20 accounts should each AE call this week?
Where is engagement above the team baseline?
Which accounts have stopped engaging in the last 14 days?
How does engagement break down by AE territory?
beforeWeRun: Score weighting: recency, frequency, or both?
Show by AE territory or aggregate?

whatYoullGet.name: Top-N hottest accounts
whatYoullGet.desc: Ranked list with score, recent signals, and AE owner.

whatYoullGet.name: Flag list
whatYoullGet.desc: Previously-hot accounts that have gone cold.

whatYoullGet.name: Score distribution
whatYoullGet.desc: Histogram of engagement scores across the target list.

whatYoullGet.name: Trend
whatYoullGet.desc: How average engagement is moving week-over-week.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your engagement ranking in ~8 min.
